segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translation.text: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why did Hugh's diet not work?

translation.text: 休的节食计划为什么没有奏效？

segments.text: My friend Hugh has always been fat, but things got so bad recently that he decided to go on a diet.

translation.text: 我的朋友休一直很胖，最近情况变得很糟，于是他决定节食。

segments.text: He began his diet a week ago.
First of all, he wrote out a long list of all the foods which were forbidden.

translation.text: 首先，他列出一张长长的清单，写明所有禁止吃的食物。

segments.text: The list included most of the things Hugh loves—butter, potatoes, rice, beer, milk, chocolate, and sweets.

translation.text: 清单包括休最喜欢的大多数东西——黄油、土豆、米饭、啤酒、牛奶、巧克力和糖果。

segments.text: Yesterday I paid him a visit.
I rang the bell and was not surprised to see that Hugh was still as fat as ever.

translation.text: 我按响门铃，看到休仍和以前一样胖，并不觉得意外。

segments.text: He led me into his room and hurriedly hid a large parcel under his desk.

translation.text: 他把我领进房间，匆忙把一个大包裹藏在书桌下面。

segments.text: It was obvious that he was very embarrassed.
When I asked him what he was doing, he smiled guiltily and then put the parcel on the desk.

translation.text: 我问他在做什么，他心虚地笑了笑，然后把包裹放到书桌上。

segments.text: He explained that his diet was so strict that he had to reward himself occasionally.

translation.text: 他解释说，节食规定太严格了，自己偶尔不得不奖励一下自己。

segments.text: Then he showed me the contents of the parcel.

translation.text: 接着，他让我看了包裹里的东西。

segments.text: It contained five large bars of chocolate and three bags of sweets.

translation.text: 里面装着五大块巧克力和三袋糖果。
